# Vendored Frontend Libraries

- `jquery-3.7.1.min.js` is the full minified jQuery Core build from `https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js`.
- `babylon.js` is the Babylon.js engine build from `https://cdn.babylonjs.com/babylon.js`.

The full build is used instead of the slim build so Neverwinter Forge can use jQuery animation/effects helpers for future UI polish.
